hero.title: OpenClaw Desktop
hero.subtitle: One-click install - the easiest way to run AI Agents on Windows
hero.description: No command line, no environment setup. Download the installer, install like any software, and get your AI assistant running in 5 minutes. Supports Feishu, Telegram, Discord and more.

whatIs.title: What is OpenClaw?
whatIs.desc: OpenClaw is an open-source AI Agent runtime framework. It lets you create and run AI assistants across multiple platforms. These assistants can:

analogy.title: Simple Analogy
analogy.content: Think of OpenClaw as an 'operating system for AI robots'. No coding required - just assemble different function modules like building blocks to create your AI assistant.
analogy.example: Example: Combine 'Understand Chinese' + 'Connect to Feishu' + 'Use Qwen API' = An AI chatbot on Feishu

channels.title: Multi-Platform Support
channels.desc: Connect to Feishu, WeChat, Telegram, Discord simultaneously. One AI assistant, multiple platforms.

aiModels.title: Support Major AI Models
aiModels.desc: Qwen, ERNIE, GPT-4, Claude, Gemini and more. Configure once, switch models anytime.

automation.title: Automated Workflows
automation.desc: Auto-reply, group management, content creation, data processing - let AI handle the repetitive work.

skills.title: Extensible Skills
skills.desc: Install plugins to enhance capabilities: file handling, web search, code execution and more.

network.title: Network
network.note: Needed for AI model API calls

admin.title: Permissions
admin.note: No admin needed, installs to user directory

steps.title: Download Installer
steps.desc: Click 'Download for Windows' above to get OpenClaw-Setup-0.1.0.exe

steps.title: Run Installer
steps.desc: Double-click the .exe file. If Windows shows a security prompt, click 'Run anyway'. The setup wizard will guide you through.

steps.title: Follow Setup Wizard
steps.desc: On first run, a setup wizard will appear. You'll need to: select AI model (e.g., Qwen, ERNIE), enter API key, choose platforms to connect (e.g., Feishu)

steps.title: Start Using
steps.desc: Once configured, OpenClaw runs in system tray. Try sending a message to your bot on Feishu or Telegram!

tips.title: Tips
tips.apiKey: No API key? Check the 'Free APIs' page to apply for free quota
tips.feishu: Feishu setup has detailed guide on the 'Feishu Setup' page

feishu.title: Feishu Setup
feishu.desc: Use OpenClaw AI assistant on Feishu

freeApi.title: Free APIs
freeApi.desc: Get free AI model access in China

feishu.title: Feishu Setup Guide
feishu.subtitle: Complete guide to running OpenClaw AI assistant on Feishu

notice.title: Prerequisites
notice.content: Before starting, you need a Feishu account and access to Feishu Open Platform. Individual users can use 'Self-Built App' mode.

steps.title: Step 1: Create Feishu App
steps.desc: Go to Feishu Open Platform (open.feishu.cn), log in, and go to Developer Console. Click 'Create Enterprise Self-Built App'.
details: Fill in app name (e.g., My AI Assistant)

steps.title: Step 2: Get Credentials
steps.desc: In the app page, find 'Credentials & Basic Info', copy these values:

steps.title: Step 3: Configure Permissions
steps.desc: Click 'Permissions Management' on the left, add these permissions:

steps.title: Step 4: Publish App
steps.desc: After configuring permissions, you need to create a version and publish:

steps.title: Step 5: Configure in OpenClaw
steps.desc: Open OpenClaw Desktop, go to 'Channels' settings, select 'Feishu', paste App ID and App Secret from Step 2.
steps.tips: We recommend 'Polling Mode' - simple and stable, no webhook setup needed.

steps.title: Step 6: Test
steps.desc: Find your bot in Feishu and send a message. If configured correctly, AI will respond!

items.a: Go back to Feishu Open Platform and re-copy App Secret. Make sure there are no spaces. If still not working, try regenerating.
1. Confirm app is published; 2. Confirm bot is added as contact; 3. Check if OpenClaw is running.
Check the 'Free APIs' page - major Chinese providers offer free quotas.

freeApi.title: Free API Summary
freeApi.subtitle: Summary of free quotas from major Chinese AI model providers
freeApi.notice: Free quotas below are sufficient for personal use. Application process usually takes a few minutes.

howTo.title: How to Get Key
steps: Create app to get AppID, API Key, Secret Key
Enter API Key and Secret Key in OpenClaw

ali.name: Alibaba Qwen
ali.freeTier:
Qwen-Turbo: 1M Tokens/month
Qwen-Plus: 1M Tokens/month
Qwen-Max: Limited free

howTo.title: How to Get Key
steps: Log in to Bailian platform with Alibaba Cloud account

howTo.title: How to Get Key
steps: Visit iFlytek Open Platform and register
Create app in 'My Apps' to get APPID, APISecret, APIKey
Enter all three values in OpenClaw

howTo.title: How to Get Key
steps: Visit Zhipu AI Open Platform and register
Create API key on 'API Keys' page

tips.title: Usage Tips
tips.quota: Free quotas refresh monthly - if exhausted, wait for next month
tips.cost: Most platforms stop service when quota exceeded - no surprise charges
tips.key: API key is like a password - don't share it

alternatives.title: Similar Products
alternatives.subtitle: Overview of major AI Agent platforms in China
alternatives.notice: All products below are from major Chinese internet companies, each with unique features. OpenClaw's advantages: open-source, self-hostable, supports private deployment.

coze.name: ByteDance Coze
coze.description: ByteDance's AI Bot development platform, supports drag-and-drop workflow orchestration, integrates ByteDance ecosystem.
coze.target: For users who want to quickly create bots without self-hosting

tongyi.name: Alibaba Tongyi
tongyi.description: Alibaba Cloud's AI chat assistant based on Qwen LLM, supports multi-turn conversation and content creation.
tongyi.target: For users already using Alibaba Cloud

wenxin.name: Baidu ERNIE Yiyan
wenxin.description: Baidu's generative AI product based on ERNIE LLM, supports dialogue and content creation.
wenxin.target: For users needing Baidu AI capabilities

xinghuo.name: iFlytek Spark
xinghuo.description: iFlytek's cognitive LLM with strong multilingual and voice interaction capabilities, optimized for education.
xinghuo.target: For users with voice interaction needs or iFlytek ecosystem

zhipu.name: Zhipu ChatGLM
zhipu.description: Zhipu AI's chat assistant based on GLM LLM, open-source and commercially usable.
zhipu.target: For developers or users needing deep customization

whyOpenclaw.title: Why Choose OpenClaw?
reasons: Open source & transparent: Code visible, no vendor lock-in
Self-hostable: Data stays local, privacy secure
Extensible: Support custom plugins and skills
Lightweight: One-click Windows install, no Docker needed
